summary: Following the defeat of the Rebel Knight Commander Kalu, the Mano Guild attempts the main scenario boss raid but faces a devastating counterattack from General Eward. While other players debate the raid order and strategies, the protagonist decides to challenge the boss alone. During this time, he discovers a powerful item, the 'Master of the Dark Arts' ring, and unlocks new, potent skills linked to the Heavenly Demon's arts.
key_moments: The Mano Guild begins their failed assault on the main scenario boss, General Eward.
General Eward easily overwhelms the Mano Guild, incapacitating their leader, Marco.
The protagonist decides to challenge the boss solo and gains significant power-ups, including an Epic-grade ring and the 'Breath of the Heavenly Demon' skill.
